title: The Midnight Library
author: Matt Haig
description: A mysterious story of a forest hiding ancient secrets and forgotten civilizations.

title: The Pragmatic Programmer

description: A complete guide to modern JavaScript, covering ES6+, frameworks, and best practices.

title: Reality Is Not What It Seems
author: Carlo Rovelli
description: An introduction to quantum physics and how it shapes our understanding of reality.

title: Charlotte's Web
author: E.B. White
description: A time-travel story where past and future collide in unexpected ways.

title: You Don't Know JS

description: Learn React from scratch and build modern, scalable web applications.

title: Sapiens: A Brief History of Humankind
author: Yuval Noah Harari
description: Discover the history and future of space missions and interstellar travel.

title: The Alchemist
author: Paulo Coelho
description: A haunting tale of secrets revealed under the cover of darkness.

title: Deep Dive into Python
author: Adarsh Divakaran
description: Advanced Python programming techniques for real-world applications.

title: The Order of Time
author: Carlo Rovelli
description: Explore the complexities of the human brain and its incredible capabilities.

title: The Hunger Games
author: Suzanne Collins
description: An epic story of war, honor, and the fight to reclaim a lost kingdom.

title: Cracking the Coding Interview
author: Gayle Laakmann McDowell
description: Understand artificial intelligence and its impact on the future of technology.

title: The Elegant Universe
author: Brian Greene
description: A clear and concise explanation of climate change and its global effects.
